pattern: Building a string left to right while never letting closes outnumber opens enumerates exactly the well-formed parenthesis combinations.
hints: Every valid string uses n opens and n closes, and at no prefix may the number of closes exceed the opens.
Grow the string one character at a time, deciding whether the next character can legally be an open or a close.
Backtrack tracking opens and closes used: add '(' while opens < n, add ')' while closes < opens, and record the string when its length reaches 2n.

stress.description: every valid n exercised; the count is the nth Catalan number
stress.note: small domain capped at 8 per constraints so the brute-force oracle stays fast
